Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • compartment_id - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • domain_name - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • subscription_email - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • is_governance_enabled - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for the domain.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for the domain.
